createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. implement is the committed 8cd13fff fix; test/regression ran live this session with real RED->GREEN + guard evidence; simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews; security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance.

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Discovered and packeted BUG-025-005; identified the generic-validator misrouting and the catch-and-publish swallow via source inspection.

scopeSummary.title: Enforce Subject-Correct Outgoing Validation
scopeSummary.notes: All 18 DoD items complete. Round 4 (2026-07-21) re-verified the landed fix (8cd13fff) with a fresh RED->GREEN Python unit dispatch cycle (real _consume_loop + real _handle_poison; 708 passed), the relevant live synthesis/cross-source E2E on the ephemeral stack (SYNTH_E2E_EXIT=0, both TestKnowledge* PASS, stack fully torn down), and a fully-green Build Quality Gate. The prior broad-suite foreign findings (assistant/PWA/Drive) are consolidated on main (b476198, ancestor of HEAD) and dispositioned per G095 as outside the ml/ boundary.

executionHistory.note: Full bug packet created; the fix landed at 8cd13fff from the isolated worktree, then stalled uncertified (pre-yq-fix).

executionHistory.summary: Round 4 reconcile: the root-cause fix is the committed 8cd13fff (git-verified ancestor of HEAD 926f0eb9). Re-verified present this session — ml/app/nats_client.py line 147 routes synthesis.crosssource to the 'crosssource' mode via the closed OUTGOING_VALIDATION_MODES table, ml/app/validation.py defines validate_crosssource_result (strict FR-02..FR-06), and the catch-and-log swallow is removed so PayloadValidationError propagates to _handle_poison before publish/ack. No runtime code rebuilt; no residual hole; working tree returned clean after the temporary RED revert.

Round 4 fresh current-session RED->GREEN. RED (routing temporarily reverted crosssource->artifact): test_crosssource_dispatch_accepts_valid_concept_response FAILs (publish awaited 0 times, false 'artifact_id is required' via nats_client.py:697->261 / validation.py:52) and test_contract_specific_outgoing_validation_modes FAILs (assert 'artifact' == 'crosssource') -> 2 failed, 56 passed, RED_EXIT=1. GREEN (git checkout restored): focused 58 passed + full Python unit 708 passed, 2 deselected, PYUNIT_EXIT=0. The _consume_loop dispatch regressions + _handle_poison retry/nak branch run the real handler; only the external LiteLLM completion is replaced. Evidence in report.md#round-4-fresh-red-green.

regression-quality-guard.sh --bugfix ml/tests/test_nats_client.py ml/tests/test_validation.py -> adversarial signal detected, 0 violation(s), 0 warning(s), REGQUAL_EXIT=0. The adversarial dispatch regression is non-tautological: the RED capture proves test_crosssource_dispatch_accepts_valid_concept_response fails the moment the generic validator is reselected. Neighbor subjects (artifact/digest/photo/unknown) stay green in the full suite. No product regression; no findings to route.

Bounded review: the landed fix is minimal and proportional — one validator (validate_crosssource_result), one closed OUTGOING_VALIDATION_MODES routing table with a startup RuntimeError consistency guard, and one _validate_outgoing_result helper at the existing validation boundary. No new framework, dependency, schema language, transport, or config. ./smackerel.sh check clean (config in sync with SST, scenario-lint OK). Nothing to simplify.

Bounded stability review: fail-loud and non-destabilizing — validation now precedes publish and a PayloadValidationError propagates to the pre-existing _handle_poison (nak for retry / dead-letter+term at exhaustion) instead of the removed catch-and-log-then-publish path. Zero Docker/Compose/container-lifecycle/schema/NATS/migration changes; no new persistent state. Neighbor subjects (artifact/digest/photo/unknown) retain their exact prior behavior, proven by the neighbor regressions in the GREEN suite; check confirms config in sync with SST.
